northstar: Phuc Forecast (DREAM → FORECAST → DECIDE → ACT → VERIFY)

metadata.title: LinkedIn Profile Optimization to 10/10
metadata.description: Complete LinkedIn profile optimization based on expert research (Greg Isenberg, Josh Bersin, Lex Fridman, Dwarkesh Patel). Optimizes headline, About section, removes outdated experiences, and applies mobile-first hook strategy.
metadata.target_persona: Solo AI founder, verified intelligence, open source

queries: Greg Isenberg LinkedIn profile optimization advice 2026
top AI podcasters LinkedIn profile tips Lex Fridman Dwarkesh Patel
famous HR experts LinkedIn profile best practices 2026
key_findings: Mobile shows only 140 characters before 'see more'
Hook needs bold promise + key metric up front
Headline formula: Role + What you build + Who benefits + Authority
About structure: Hook (140 chars) → Story → Proof → CTA
Use vertical bars (|) in headline for readability
Include specific metrics early (100% success, 4.075x compression, etc.)

expert_patterns.greg_isenberg: Portfolio of internet businesses, clear value prop
expert_patterns.dwarkesh_patel: Intensive preparation, intellectual rigor, 'Lex but better'

headline.after: Software 5.0 Architect | 65537 Authority | Building Verified AI OS in Public
headline.rationale: Uses vertical bars, shows authority (65537), clear positioning (Software 5.0), building-in-public signal

about_hook.before: I build software that beats entropy. (39 chars - weak for mobile)
about_hook.after: Building 5 verified AI products solo: 100% SWE-bench score, 4.075x compression, 99.3% accuracy. No VC. Open source. Harvard '98. (130 chars)
about_hook.rationale: Bold claim + 3 key metrics in first 140 chars (mobile cutoff), establishes authority immediately

experience.rationale: Remove outdated roles to focus on current work

llm_learnings.speed_optimization: Removed asyncio.sleep() delays, use domcontentloaded instead of networkidle → 20x faster
llm_learnings.html_first: Clean HTML is better than ARIA for LLM understanding - shows actual rendered content
llm_learnings.evidence_collection: Always verify actions worked (URL changed, element visible, console clean)
llm_learnings.session_persistence: Save session state to avoid re-login on future runs

execution_trace.reasoning: Go directly to intro edit page to update headline

execution_trace.value: Software 5.0 Architect | 65537 Authority | Building Verified AI OS in Public
execution_trace.reasoning: Apply expert headline formula: Role + Authority + Building-in-public signal
Navigate to About section to apply mobile-optimized hook

execution_trace.value:
Building 5 verified AI products solo: 100% SWE-bench score, 4.075x compression, 99.3% accuracy. No VC. Open source. Harvard '98.

Not chatbots. Not AI that hallucinates. Software 5.0 = verified intelligence using deterministic math + prime number architecture (65537D OMEGA).

Currently building:
• STILLWATER OS — Compression + intelligence platform (4.075x universal compression)
• SOLACEAGI — Expert Council SaaS (65537 verified decision-makers, not black-box LLMs)
• PZIP — Beats LZMA on all file types (91.4% win rate on test corpus)
• PHUCNET — Solo founder hub + ecosystem center (ko-fi.com/phucnet for tips)
• IF-THEORY — Mathematical foundations (prime number research, 137+ discoveries)

Philosophy:
Phuc Forecast (DREAM → FORECAST → DECIDE → ACT → VERIFY)
- Memory × Care × Iteration = Intelligence (LEK)
- Rivals before God (641 → 274177 → 65537 verification ladder)
- Never-worse fallback (regeneration is truth)

Why open-source?
1. Verification gates (9 audit reports per product, all published)
2. Community keeps me honest (harsh QA culture)
3. Solo founder narrative (one engineer, big ambitions)
4. Support via tips (ko-fi.com/phucnet) drives alignment with users

Recent wins:
✓ 100% SWE-bench verified (6/6 benchmarks)
✓ Browser automation complete (Chrome, Edge, Safari control)
✓ OOLONG verified (99.3% infinite context accuracy)
✓ 137 prime discoveries published (Einstein's favorite number)

Building in public. Always shipping. Always verifying.
Boston-based | Solo founder | Verified AI.

Support the journey: https://ko-fi.com/phucnet

reusable_components.mobile_hook_formula: Bold claim + 3 metrics in first 140 chars
